description: Binary assertion test suite for ERD Skill self-improvement loop. Each assertion is objectively true/false — automatable without human judgment.

tests.prompt: Create an ERD for a habit tracking mobile app using Next.js and Supabase

assertions.text: Document contains a Non-Functional Requirements section with measurable targets
Document contains at least one ADR (Architectural Decision Record) entry
Each ADR includes: Context, Decision, Rationale, and Alternatives considered
Database schema includes validation rules for at least one field
Database type (SQL or NoSQL) is explicitly declared
API endpoints table includes error response codes (4xx/5xx)
Document contains SLO or SLI definitions with numeric targets
Document contains a Security section with OWASP or threat modeling reference
Document contains a Testing Strategy with at least 3 test types
Infrastructure Provisioning Checklist section present

tests.prompt: Write an engineering spec for an AI-powered resume builder with RAG capabilities

assertions.text: Document contains an AI/LLM System Design section
AI section describes the RAG pipeline or retrieval strategy
AI section includes cost projection or token cost estimate
AI section includes quality monitoring or hallucination detection approach
Document contains LINDDUN privacy threat modeling or privacy threat analysis
PII fields are identified in the database schema
Document contains at least one ADR for a major tech choice
API versioning strategy is defined (URI path, header, or query param)
Feature flag strategy section present with rollout phases
Error handling section specifies a standardized error response format

tests.prompt: Create a technical spec for a multi-tenant SaaS analytics platform with 100K users

assertions.text: Capacity planning section includes RPS or concurrent user targets
Non-Functional Requirements include scalability targets with numeric values
SLO targets are defined with time window (e.g., 28-day rolling window)
Error budget is calculated (1 - SLO)
Database schema specifies row-level security or multi-tenancy isolation approach
At least one ADR documents a scalability-related tech decision
Monitoring section defines at least 2 alerting thresholds
Rollback strategy is defined in Infrastructure section
Testing strategy includes performance or load testing
Seed data requirements present in Database section

tests.prompt: Write an ERD for a payment processing system with GDPR compliance requirements

assertions.text: Document contains GDPR or LINDDUN privacy threat analysis
PII fields are flagged in the database schema with PII classification
Data retention policy is specified
Right-to-delete implementation approach is documented
Payment card data security (PCI DSS) is mentioned in security section
Encryption specifications present (at rest and in transit)
Audit logging requirements are documented
ADR for database choice includes security rationale
API endpoints for payment include idempotency key documentation
Infrastructure section mentions environment variable management for secrets

tests.prompt: Create an ERD to hand off to my tech-project-forge skill — Next.js SaaS project management tool

assertions.text: Database type explicitly declared (SQL vs NoSQL)
Database schema includes validation rules for field types
Database section includes seed data requirements
API endpoints table includes authentication requirement per endpoint
Third-party integrations section lists services with their purpose
Tech stack table present with technology, version, and purpose columns
Implementation plan includes milestone names
At least one ADR for a key architectural decision
Non-functional requirements section present
Infrastructure provisioning checklist present
